Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Bramble Spell Karui Sceptre Unique ID: 94536ae2957505e3cf95703a54b19573467daa1a0d64a6c71eaae65c2d3fcb09 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality Enemies you Kill have a 15% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage +34% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}47% increased Spell Damage {crafted}21% increased Cast Speed {crafted}Gain 4% of Non-Chaos Damage as extra Chaos Damage
